testcase.name: Query QRIS transaction status smoke › QRY-STS-003 - status expired setelah inject sandbox / expired status after sandbox injection
Query QRIS transaction status smoke › QRY-STS-004 - status declined setelah inject sandbox / declined status after sandbox injection
Query QRIS transaction status smoke › QRY-STS-005 - status refunded setelah inject sandbox / refunded status after sandbox injection
Query QRIS transaction status smoke › QRY-STS-006 - status canceled setelah inject sandbox / canceled status after sandbox injection
Query QRIS transaction status smoke › QRY-STS-007 - status failed setelah inject sandbox / failed status after sandbox injection
Refund QRIS smoke › RFN-SMK-001 - refund sukses untuk transaksi QRIS approved lalu query status refunded / successful refund for approved QRIS transaction then query refunded status
Cancel QRIS smoke › CNL-SMK-001 - cancel sukses untuk transaksi QRIS pending lalu query status canceled / successful cancel for pending QRIS transaction then query canceled status
Cancel QRIS smoke › CNL-SMK-002 - cancel sukses untuk transaksi QRIS approved lalu query status canceled / successful cancel for approved QRIS transaction then query canceled status
